problems.legend: to become worse in quality, condition, or value
to experience something unpleasant as a result of one's actions
a person, thing, or situation that is annoying or causes trouble
made or done by someone whose name is not known or not given
separate and distinct from other things
to represent or describe someone or something in words, pictures, or art
to provide someone or something with money, qualities, or abilities
to fail to work or operate correctly
problems.commentary: 고장, 기능 부전; 제 기능을 발휘하지 않다

problems.legend: to give or allow someone to have something, often officially
to hit or crash into something or someone
a disadvantage or problem that makes something less useful or successful
unwilling and hesitant to do something
to bring someone or something under control by force or persuasion
problems.commentary: (나라·국민 등을) 정복하다, 진압하다; 복종시키다; (감정·충동 등을) 억누르다

problems.legend: to make a person, place, or quality poor or weaker
to live in a particular place
to add something to improve or complete something else
a person or company that sells goods or services
having a lot of money and a high standard of living
to move or cause something to move into a sloping position
a person who rents and lives in or uses land or a building
the amount by which something is less than what is needed or expected
a purpose, reason, or benefit for doing something
an unfair preference for or against a person, group, or idea
repeated behavior that annoys, threatens, or upsets someone
an agreement or connection between people, groups, or countries for a shared purpose
to stop moving, happening, or continuing
a person who is among the first to explore or develop a new area or idea
the highest point of a mountain, or an important meeting between leaders
the practice of keeping yourself and your surroundings clean to prevent disease
able to speak, write, or express oneself easily and smoothly
something owned by a person or group, or a quality that something has
serious and important, especially in a worrying or dangerous way
a building, service, or piece of equipment provided for a particular purpose
problems.commentary: ((~s)) 설비, 시설; 기능; 건물, 장소; 재능, 능력

problems.legend: to move someone or something from one place, position, or situation to another
problems.commentary: 이동하다, 전근[전학]하다; 환승하다; 전송하다; 이동, 이적, 전학; 환승

problems.legend: the teaching staff of a school or university, or a natural ability
an activity involving skill in making things by hand, or a vehicle such as a boat or aircraft
problems.commentary: (수)공예; 기술; 배, 비행기, 우주선; 공들여 만들다

problems.legend: to control, guide, or show someone the way; going straight to a place
training that makes people obey rules or control their behavior
problems.commentary: 규율, 훈육; 절제력; 단련, 수련; 징계하다; 훈육하다

problems.legend: to move one's hand gently over something, or a hit made with a hand or object
a formal examination of evidence in court, or a test of something
